_comment: Layer types: poster = one PNG for zoomed-out view. minimap = map##_##_ tiles (max detail only).

world_poster.description: Master layout image — placement reference only (not rendered on globe).

globe_version.label: WOW Commander Alpha globe v3
globe_version.notes: Merged overview NetworkLinks (1 per region), tiered refresh policy, staggered preload, regional campaign shells. Placement v1 locked.

world_index.description: Commander Alpha v3: Pacific vignette + merged overview links + lazy detail pyramids.

terrain_underlay.description: Real-Earth land mask only — hides GE terrain on continents, transparent ocean.

viewpoints.description: Quick View bookmarks in GEP Places (planet + strategic). NetworkLink LOD uses lazy_links below.

tile_filter.description: Default tile filter; overridden per world_variants entry when building.

placement_version.label: Pacific theater placement v1
placement_version.notes: Approved core-10 MGRS midpoints, footprint sizes, Northrend 20° rotation, and 4-tier overview stack.

geographic_placement.description: MGRS grid centers for major landmasses. Run: python3 scripts/apply_geographic_placements.py
geographic_placement.size_multipliers_note: Applied once to earth_placement — same bounds for z0 overview AND detail tiles (not compounded per zoom level). Large multipliers inflate planet-view silhouettes; use overview_visibility_max_miles to limit when per-region z0 appears.
geographic_placement.azeroth_hemisphere_note: All Azeroth landmasses remain in the Pacific hemisphere (lon roughly +180 to -100). The opposite hemisphere is reserved for outland, draenor, shadowlands, etc.

other_worlds_overview_tiers._comment: NetworkLink preload band for opposite hemisphere — matches Pacific vignette planet scale (~30k mi)

opposite_hemisphere.description: Extra-world zones on the far side of the globe from the Azeroth Pacific cluster. Nudge MGRS in mgrs_centers, then run apply_geographic_placements.py

zoom_transition.description: Overview PNG tiers (planet + theatre). Detail pyramids disabled for testing.

camera_tiers.description: Google Earth 'eye alt' in miles above the globe. Overview shows when farther than detail_start_miles.
camera_tiers.notes: poster_lazy: Azeroth poster 6000–3200 mi for navigation; lazy region pyramids load in viewport. Roads ~600 mi (z6), tactical ~150 mi (z7).

azeroth_regions.description: Kalimdor, EK, etc. share wow.export map 'azeroth'. Export one land mass at a time and copy PNGs directly into that region's minimap/ folder. sort_azeroth_tiles.py is optional.

layers.label: Azeroth world map (zoom-out poster)
layers.notes: Placement reference only (not rendered on globe). Run derive_poster_placements.py after moving islands on this image.

layers.label: Nazjatar
layers.notes: Separate map in wow.export (BfA). Not on the azeroth grid.

layers.label: Mechagon City
layers.notes: Mechagon Island / Rustbolt. wow.export map may be mechagon or mechagonisland — copy PNGs here either way.

layers.label: Siren Isle
layers.notes: Small zone — wow.export map name may vary; copy PNGs here.

layers.label: Founders Point
layers.notes: Small zone — wow.export map name may vary; copy PNGs here.

layers.label: Razorwind Shores
layers.notes: Small zone — wow.export map name may vary; copy PNGs here.

layers.label: The Maelstrom
layers.notes: Great Sea / Maelstrom between Kalimdor and Eastern Kingdoms. Also pinned to Pacific on the globe (see anchor in this file).

layers.label: Tol Barad
layers.notes: If wow.export uses a different map name, export there and tell Grok.

layers.label: Wandering Isle
layers.notes: Small zone — may appear under pandaria or wanderingisle in wow.export.

layers.label: Outland
layers.notes: Opposite hemisphere — not part of Azeroth archipelago. Enable after MINIMAP export + MGRS placement.

layers.label: Draenor
layers.notes: Opposite hemisphere — not part of Azeroth archipelago.

layers.label: Shadowlands
layers.notes: Opposite hemisphere — not part of Azeroth archipelago.

layers.label: Zereth Mortis
layers.notes: Opposite hemisphere — Shadowlands epilogue zone; verify wow.export map name.

layers.label: Mardum
layers.notes: Opposite hemisphere — Legion DH starting zone; verify wow.export map name.

layers.label: K'aresh
layers.notes: Opposite hemisphere — verify wow.export map name.

layers.label: Voidstorm
layers.notes: Opposite hemisphere — verify wow.export map name.

layers.label: The Dread Chain
layers.notes: Frozen necromancy island expedition — near Northrend
